Clawmachine historical-UI reference

Internal non-commercial fair-use research reference. Total: 71 MB across 20 targets. Ratings: S core donor, A strong, B supporting, C counter-example.

TargetItemsFitTitle
mac-os-910/10SMac OS 9 / System 7 / Copland — Finder, Apple Menu, Control Strip, Extensions
nextstep8/8ANeXTSTEP / OPENSTEP 4.2 — dock, Workspace Manager, file viewer
beos-haiku6/6ABeOS / Haiku — Tracker, Deskbar, replicants
win2k-admin8/9BWindows 2000 / 98 professional admin tools — MMC, Event Viewer, Registry, Perfmon
bloomberg-terminal6/6SBloomberg Terminal — function density, Launchpad, orange-on-black
pro-tools-cubase-reaper9/9APro Tools / Cubase / Logic Pro — mixer channel strips, meters, faders
reaper-daw8/8AReaper DAW — dense custom-theme UI
winamp-skins9/9AWinamp classic skins — skinnable player aesthetic
classic-im9/9BTrillian / mIRC / Adium — classic IM + IRC chat aesthetic
pip-boy7/7SFallout Pip-Boy — amber/green phosphor terminal
deus-ex7/7SDeus Ex: Human Revolution / Mankind Divided — augmented HUD, gold-on-black
cyberpunk-2077-hud6/6ACyberpunk 2077 HUD — minimap, corpo popups, inventory grid
mass-effect7/7CMass Effect: Andromeda — soft-tech SciFi UI
dead-space7/7SDead Space — diegetic UI (RIG spine, hologram menus)
eve-online7/7AEVE Online — overview window, dense tabular MMO UI
ksp-factorio10/10AKerbal Space Program + Factorio — diegetic production / mission dashboards
rpg-inventory8/8ADiablo 2 / Path of Exile / Dragon Age — RPG inventory grids
cli-tools9/9SCLI / TUI — htop, btop, lazygit, vim status lines
mac-icon-archives9/9SClassic Mac icon archives — bitmap 32x32 ICN# era
susan-kare8/8SSusan Kare — original bitmap sketches + early Mac icon design
All screenshots are property of their respective rights-holders. Reproduced here solely for internal non-commercial design research. Do not redistribute.
